---
title: "Schedule"
pagetitle: "Schedule — EM 619 MLPA"
---

::: {.callout-warning}
## Tentative
This is a **26-lecture plan** (1.5 hours each) for **Module 3, 2026**. Classes run **27 Jun → 3 Oct 2026** on **Wednesday (7:45–9:15 PM)** and **Saturday (11:00 AM–12:30 PM)**, online over Zoom. Dates and topics are **tentative** and may shift with class pace. Slides and recordings will be posted here as the course progresses.
:::

| # | Date | Topic |
|:--:|:----:|:------|
| | | **Module 1 · Foundations** |
| 1 | Sat 27 Jun | Introduction & Logistics; What is Machine Learning? |
| 2 | Wed 1 Jul | Conventions & Metrics; Classification vs Regression |
| 3 | Sat 4 Jul | Data Preparation & Preprocessing |
| | | **Module 2 · Trees & Ensembles** |
| 4 | Wed 8 Jul | Decision Trees — Entropy & Information Gain |
| 5 | Sat 11 Jul | Decision Trees — Overfitting & Bias–Variance Trade-off |
| 6 | Wed 15 Jul | Ensemble Learning — Bagging & Random Forests |
| 7 | Sat 18 Jul | Random Forests — Feature Importance; Hyperparameter Tuning & Cross-validation |
| 8 | Wed 22 Jul | Boosting & Stacking — Gradient Boosting Machines |
| | | **Module 3 · Regression & Optimization** |
| 9 | Sat 25 Jul | Linear Regression — Model Fitting & Normal Equation |
| 10 | Wed 29 Jul | Linear Regression — Basis Functions & Geometric Interpretation |
| 11 | Sat 1 Aug | Linear Regression — Dummy Variables & Multicollinearity |
| 12 | Wed 5 Aug | Gradient Descent & Optimization (Taylor Series) |
| 13 | Sat 8 Aug | Stochastic & Mini-Batch Gradient Descent; Time Complexity |
| | | _**Examination-1** · 10–16 Aug — **Mid-Module Break** · 17–23 Aug — classes resume 24 Aug_ |
| 14 | Wed 26 Aug | Regularization — Ridge & Lasso Regression |
| | | **Module 4 · Classification & Evaluation** |
| 15 | Sat 29 Aug | Logistic Regression — Sigmoid & Cross-Entropy |
| 16 | Wed 2 Sep | Logistic Regression — Optimization & Regularization |
| 17 | Sat 5 Sep | Model Evaluation — Precision, Recall, F1, ROC; Cross-validation |
| 18 | Wed 9 Sep | Support Vector Machines — Margins & Hyperplanes |
| 19 | Sat 12 Sep | Support Vector Machines — Kernels |
| | | **Module 5 · Neural Networks & Deep Learning** |
| 20 | Wed 16 Sep | Neural Networks — MLP, Architecture & Activations |
| 21 | Sat 19 Sep | Neural Networks — Backpropagation |
| 22 | Wed 23 Sep | Neural Networks — Implementation with Keras 3.0 |
| 23 | Sat 26 Sep | Convolutional Neural Networks — I |
| 24 | Wed 30 Sep | Convolutional Neural Networks — II; Transfer Learning |
| | | **Module 6 · Unsupervised & Advanced Topics** |
| 25 | Sat 3 Oct | Unsupervised Learning — Clustering (K-means, Hierarchical) & Dimensionality Reduction (PCA, t-SNE) |
| 26 | _TBC_ | Transformers; AI Ethics, Bias & Fairness; Course Wrap-up |

::: {.callout-note}
## Key dates (Module 3, 2026)
- **Classes commence:** 27 Jun · **Last day of classes:** 3 Oct
- **Examination-1:** 10–16 Aug · **Mid-Module Break:** 17–23 Aug · **Classes resume:** 24 Aug
- **Examination-2:** 5–11 Oct · **Make-up Exam:** 13 Oct
- **Grade submission:** 15 Oct · **Disclosure of grades:** 16 Oct
:::
